name: Braetknoedel (Ground Meat Dumplings)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir in milk or cream into the ground meat.
2. Add the egg, seasonings, and as much breadcrumbs as needed to make the mixture firm but still pliable.
3. Form the mixture into small dumplings.
4. Cook the dumplings in simmering salted water until they float to the surface (do not boil).
5. Serve hot in beef broth.
Serves 4.
